testsuite.name: testngPackage.SubscribeTest

testcase.name: votetest

error.message: Unable to find element with locator By.id: newsletter-email For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.36.0', revision: '6d115cfd87' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '12.7.6', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: driver.version: RemoteWebDriver
